candidate_definition_hints.text: The time has finally come. Since Neovim 0.5 is out, and LSP is officially supported, I'd suggest you migrate over to it. I have been using it instead of this plugin for a while and it solves many pain points that I've not been able to. This will stay around for older neovim rele…
